refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: An array of 1 or more TopoElement objects, generally used to pass around components of TopoGeometry objects.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT '{{1,2,4},{3,4,5}}'::topology.topoelementarray As tea; ERROR: value for domain topology.topoelementarray violates check constraint "dimensions"
